headline: Raymond James Raises its Price Target on Cummins (CMI)
summary: Cummins Inc. (NYSE:CMI) is one of the 10 Best Data Center Stocks with Huge Upside Potential. On May 26, 2026, Raymond James raised the firm’s price target on Cummins Inc. (NYSE:CMI) to $745 from $675 and maintained an Outperform rating on the shares. Raymond James cited stronger long-term growth assumptions, saying the prior $45B-$50B 2030 […]

headline: Anti-AI Investing: The HALO Moat
summary: Capture long-term value via HALO stocks like American Tower, Americold, and VICI Properties for low obsolescence and high yields. Read more here.
